title: Chewy Sour Zanzibari Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A show-off Tunisian dish featuring a sour and chewy cabbage base marinated in paleo-friendly sauce with optional gluten-free rice to serve.

ingredients.name: Paleo-friendly sauce ingredients (optional)
ingredients.amount: varies by recipe, typically includes apple cider vinegar, honey or agave nectar, lemon juice, and spices like cayenne pepper for heat and a touch of sweetness

ingredients.name: Optional garnishes (for presentation)
ingredients.amount: varies by taste preference, such as nuts, seeds, or fresh herbs

instructions: Prepare the cabbage: Cut the head of cabbage into thin strips and blanch in boiling water for about 1 minute. Drain thoroughly.
Blend paleo-friendly sauce ingredients to a smooth consistency if using. Add olive oil and heat over medium-low, allowing it to simmer for at least 5 minutes or until desired thickness is achieved.
In a large skillet with the cabbage strips added first, pour the paleo-friendly sauce evenly and stir well, ensuring the cabbage is coated. Cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Serve immediately on plates garnished as desired.
